OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Lynn O'Malley-Taylor; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Ryan Steele is present.
Attorney Aaron Farmer for the plaintiff.
Defendant Peter Max Lawrence is present.
Attorney Kim Shindel appearing for defendant in limited scope.

Judge Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 611, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-06-2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
